headline: This Hotel REIT Is Hot As Big Sporting Events Draw Masses
summary: Hotel REIT RLJ is seeing its stock climb. The company offers an attractive dividend yield but changes in consumer spending pose a risk.

headline: Marriott, CG Hospitality to open 100 Series by Marriott hotels in China
summary: The first four properties are scheduled to launch by the end of 2026.
